Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.ParserPipe

Packages that use ParserPipe
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.examples.parser
Parser Examples
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected <T> T
    CborParserSession.doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type)
     
    Constructors in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor with parameters of type ParserPipe
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    CborInputStream(ParserPipe pipe)
    Constructor.
     
    CborTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe)
    Constructor with default settings.
     
    CborTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, CborParserSession session)
    Constructor used by CborParserSession.parseTokens(Object) to plumb the calling session through so that CborTokenReader.read(Class) can delegate to the CBOR databind path.

    Constructors in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json with parameters of type ParserPipe
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    JsonTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe)
    Constructor with default JsonTokenReader.Settings.
     
    JsonTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, JsonTokenReader.Settings settings)
    Constructor with explicit JsonTokenReader.Settings.
     
    JsonTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, JsonTokenReader.Settings settings, JsonParserSession session)
    Constructor used by JsonParser.parseTokens(Object) to plumb the calling parser's session in so that JsonTokenReader.read(Class) can delegate to the existing databind path.

  • Uses of ParserPipe in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser that return ParserPipe
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final ParserPipe
    InputStreamParserSession.createPipe(Object input)
    Wraps the specified input object into a ParserPipe object so that it can be easily converted into a stream or reader.
    protected ParserPipe
    ParserSession.createPipe(Object input)
    Wraps the specified input object into a ParserPipe object so that it can be easily converted into a stream or reader.
    final ParserPipe
    ReaderParserSession.createPipe(Object input)
    Wraps the specified input object into a ParserPipe object so that it can be easily converted into a stream or reader.
    protected ParserPipe
    ParserSession.setPipe(ParserPipe pipe)
    The ParserSession.createPipe(Object) method should call this method to set the pipe for debugging purposes.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser with parameters of type ParserPipe
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> T
    Parser.doParse(ParserSession session, ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type)
    Workhorse method.
    protected <T> T
    ParserSession.doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type)
    Workhorse method.

    ParserSession.doParseIntoCollection(ParserPipe pipe, Collection<E> c, Type elementType)

    ParserSession.doParseIntoMap(ParserPipe pipe, Map<K,V> m, Type keyType, Type valueType)
    Implementation method.
    protected <T> void
    ParserSession.doParseToBeanConsumer(ParserPipe pipe, BeanConsumer<T> consumer, Class<T> elementType)
    Format-specific implementation for ParserSession.parseToBeanConsumer(java.lang.Object, org.apache.juneau.commons.function.BeanConsumer<T>, java.lang.Class<T>).
    protected ParserPipe
    ParserSession.setPipe(ParserPipe pipe)
    The ParserSession.createPipe(Object) method should call this method to set the pipe for debugging purposes.
